reasoning: The Polymarket price for this specific market was 1% just before the knowledge cutoff, indicating near-zero chance of occurring. Federal Current Expenditures (FGEXPND) almost universally increase year-over-year in nominal terms due to rising mandatory spending (Social Security, Medicare) and interest on the national debt, which together swallow most discretionary cuts. While Elon Musk and DOGE claim billions in savings, achieving an absolute $250 billion nominal drop in annualized quarterly spending from Q4 2024 to Q4 2025 is mathematically daunting against the baseline growth trend. The market sees this as practically impossible, and there is no evidence that Q1-Q3 2025 data currently tracking towards such a massive nominal decrease. I will forecast 2% (the lowest limit), aligning with the overwhelming unlikelihood of the condition being met.
